fields.remarks:
<format type="text/markdown"><![CDATA[
## Remarks

<see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFourByteTag" /> encodes four ASCII characters as a single 32-bit unsigned integer. It supports implicit conversion to and from <see langword="uint" />, and can be parsed from a string via <see cref="M:SkiaSharp.SKFourByteTag.Parse(System.String)" />.

## Examples

```csharp
// Create a tag for font weight axis
var wght = new SKFourByteTag('w', 'g', 'h', 't');
var wghtFromString = SKFourByteTag.Parse("wght");
Console.WriteLine(wght == wghtFromString); // True
```
]]></format>
fields.summary: Represents a four-byte tag used to identify font features, variation axes, and other OpenType entities.

params.value: The 32-bit unsigned integer representation of the tag.

fields.summary: Initializes a new instance of the <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFourByteTag" /> struct with a 32-bit unsigned integer value.

params.c4: The fourth character of the tag.
params.c3: The third character of the tag.
params.c2: The second character of the tag.
params.c1: The first character of the tag.

fields.summary: Initializes a new instance of the <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFourByteTag" /> struct from four characters.

entries.signature: public SKFourByteTag (char c1, char c2, char c3, char c4);

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if the specified value equals the current instance; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.
fields.summary: Determines whether the specified <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFourByteTag" /> is equal to the current instance.

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if <paramref name="obj" /> is a <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFourByteTag" /> and equals the current instance; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.
fields.summary: Determines whether the specified object is equal to the current instance.

fields.returns: A hash code for the current instance.
fields.summary: Returns the hash code for the current instance.

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if the two instances are equal; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.
fields.summary: Determines whether two <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFourByteTag" /> instances are equal.

entries.signature: public static bool operator == (SkiaSharp.SKFourByteTag left, SkiaSharp.SKFourByteTag right);

fields.returns: The 32-bit unsigned integer representation of the tag.
fields.summary: Implicitly converts a <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFourByteTag" /> to a <see langword="uint" />.

entries.signature: public static implicit operator uint (SkiaSharp.SKFourByteTag tag);

fields.returns: A <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFourByteTag" /> with the specified value.

params.tag: The 32-bit unsigned integer value to convert.

fields.summary: Implicitly converts a <see langword="uint" /> to a <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFourByteTag" />.

entries.signature: public static implicit operator SkiaSharp.SKFourByteTag (uint tag);

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if the two instances are not equal; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.
fields.summary: Determines whether two <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFourByteTag" /> instances are not equal.

entries.signature: public static bool operator != (SkiaSharp.SKFourByteTag left, SkiaSharp.SKFourByteTag right);

fields.returns: A <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFourByteTag" /> corresponding to the first four characters of <paramref name="tag" />.

params.tag: A string of up to four characters. If <see langword="null" /> or empty, returns a tag with value 0. Strings shorter than four characters are padded with spaces.

fields.summary: Parses a string into a <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFourByteTag" />.

fields.returns: A four-character string formed from the bytes of the tag value.
fields.summary: Returns the four-character string representation of this tag.
